svg.text: Connection states, pool sizing, recycling patterns, leak detection, and timeout handling
Example: 8-core, 2 disks = 18 connections per application instance
Scale up on demand, scale down on idle
1. Track borrow timestamp on each connection checkout
2. If connection not returned within leak_threshold (default: 30s), log warning
3. If not returned within force_return_timeout (default: 60s), forcibly close + alert
